description: Example custom Claude Code agents. Use /ai-iap:setup agents to generate .claude/agents/*.md. ruleBindings: language IDs from config; values = framework IDs. personaSpecialization: software|seo|ui-ux|testing|devops|generic (one agent, one specialisation).

agents.name: ios-developer
agents.description: iOS development with Swift and SwiftUI. Use when building or modifying iOS apps, views, or native iOS code.
agents.tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash

agents.name: php-developer
agents.description: PHP and Laravel backend development. Use when working on PHP code, APIs, or Laravel apps.
agents.tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash

agents.name: vue-developer
agents.description: Vue.js frontend development with TypeScript. Use when building or modifying Vue components, composables, or TypeScript frontend code.
agents.tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash

agents.name: seo-specialist
agents.description: SEO and discoverability. Use when improving meta tags, structured data, sitemaps, or content for search engines.

agents.name: ui-ux-designer
agents.description: UI/UX and design system. Use when designing components, layouts, accessibility, or CSS/styling with Tailwind or plain CSS.

agents.name: test-writer
agents.description: Test strategy and automation. Use when adding or improving unit, integration, or e2e tests, or defining test coverage.
agents.tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash

agents.name: devops
agents.description: CI/CD and infrastructure. Use when setting up or changing pipelines, deployment, or observability.
agents.tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash
